mapper.sql: p.id, p.teacher_id, p.name, p.avatar_url, p.greeting, p.system_prompt, p.tone_style, p.is_default, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM yx_ai_persona p LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON p.teacher_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT ,
FROM yx_ai_persona p LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON p.teacher_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE p.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND p.is_deleted = FALSE AND p.status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT ,
FROM yx_ai_persona p LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON p.teacher_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE p.is_default = TRUE AND p.is_deleted = FALSE AND p.status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_ai_persona SET name = #{name}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, greeting = #{greeting}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, tone_style = #{toneStyle}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_ai_persona SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_ai_persona SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
